case_title: VALLEJO STREET PARTNERS, LLC. VS. AMANDA FLAIM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JEFFREY PANZER--MANAGING MEMBER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALLEJO STREET PARTNERS, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALLEJO STREET PARTNERS, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLAIM, AMANDA $1,908.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,958.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,908.00 FILED BY VALLEJO STREET PARTNERS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT FLAIM, AMANDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF VALLEJO STREET PARTNERS, LLC.
